summary: Tested Filter & Spec Group Assignment admin UI. All backend APIs (GET filters/types, GET specifications/types, PATCH toggle-type-visibility for both) working correctly. Frontend page at /admin/filter-assignment loads with all UI elements, product group switching updates visibility states, toggle functionality calls correct APIs and updates UI, search filters items correctly.

GET /api/filters/types.details: Returns 16 filter types with id, name, slug, hidden_groups, values

GET /api/specifications/types.details: Returns 8 spec types with id, name, slug, hidden_groups

PATCH /api/specifications/types/{id}/tog.details: Adds product_group to hidden_groups array for specs
Removes product_group from hidden_groups array for specs

Admin page /admin/filter-assignment load.details: Page loads with title 'Filter & Spec Assignment', product group selector, tabs, search, refresh button

Product group selector.details: All 6 groups present (Tiles, Flooring, Materials, Tools, Accessories, Underfloor Heating)

Switching product groups updates visibil.details: Color filter shows 'Visible' in Tiles, 'Hidden' in Materials. Stats bar updates correctly (e.g., '15 visible, 1 hidden in Materials')

Toggle filter visibility.details: Clicking toggle calls API, updates UI state, shows toast notification

Specifications tab.details: Tab switches correctly, shows 8 specification items, toggle works

Search functionality.details: Searching 'color' filters to 1 item, clearing shows all 16 items

Hidden groups display.details: Filters show 'Hidden from: [group names]' badges when hidden from other groups

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - existing filter_types and specification_types collections used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter & Spec Group Assignment feature fully implemented and tested. Admin page at /admin/filter-assignment allows toggling visibility of filters and specs per product group. The hidden_groups array on filter_types and specification_types collections stores which groups a filter/spec is hidden from. Color filter is currently hidden from Materials group as test data.
